title: PDF (PDFium)
description: Text and per-block geometry extraction from PDF via Google's PDFium.

geometry.title: Geometry
geometry.description: Emit one block per positioned text rectangle, each carrying a bounding box (for the visual layout view), instead of one plain-text block per page.

glyphs.title: Per-glyph geometry
glyphs.description: Additionally attach per-character bounding boxes to each text block (implies geometry). Enables character-precise highlighting; slightly slower.

tier3.title: ML layout (tier 3)
tier3.description: Render each page and run the kapi-vision layout model over it for authoritative structure — multi-column reading order, borderless tables, figure/caption regions — beyond what page geometry alone recovers. Requires the kapi-vision plugin; falls back to geometric structure (tier 2) when it is not installed. Implies geometry.
